name: BaseLinker
summary: Read BaseLinker orders and inventory, then dry-run stock or price corrections for marketplace ERP/WMS pilots.
description: Added because Marketing identified marketplace -> ERP/WMS synchronization as the fastest monetization path: sellers need order, stock and price checks across marketplace, warehouse and accounting flows. BaseLinker has an official JSON API with X-BLToken authentication, documented order/inventory/stock/price methods and a 100 requests/minute limit. This connector is available for dry-run pilots and CI-verified, but not production-certified until tested on a customer or official test account.
useCases: Pilot: compare BaseLinker stock with ERP/WMS/CSV export and generate a dry-run correction plan.
Pilot: download confirmed orders and prepare audited handoff to ERP or accounting.
Why this connector: existing commerce panels synchronize data, but urirun adds URI-level audit, dry-run, approval flow and alert composition with other connectors.

examples.title: Read connector readiness without exposing token
List confirmed orders from a timestamp
